# BP-66 positive: a sentinel wrapped with %w is compared with ==.
lang: go
file: BP-66-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"errors"
	"fmt"
)

var ErrMissing = errors.New("missing")

func lookup() error {
	err := fmt.Errorf("lookup: %w", ErrMissing)
	if err == ErrMissing {
		return nil
	}
	return err
}
